headline: Apollo Funds to Acquire Forvia’s Automotive Interiors Business
summary: Transaction to Establish Leading Global Automotive Interiors Supplier as Standalone CompanyNEW YORK, April 27, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Apollo (NYSE: APO) today announced that Apollo-managed funds (the “Apollo Funds”) have agreed to acquire the Interiors Business Group of Forvia (“Interiors Business” or the “Company”), a leading global supplier of automotive interior systems, from Forvia SE (EPA: FRVIA) in a carve-out transaction.
